evals.expected_output: A markdown table showing Surface | Status | Action taken | Confirm? for each documentation surface, with stale surfaces identified and proposed fixes.

Produces the final Surface | Status | Action taken | Confirm? markdown table — TODO: human review

knowledge_assertions.context: Must reference the Tier 1 marker-block script by name
Must reference the Tier 1 Docusaurus wrapper script by name
Must use the --check flag to detect staleness before re-running scripts
Must produce the summary table with Surface/Status/Action columns
Must use the defined status values (PASS, STALE, SKIP) in the summary
Must identify the old skill name as a stale reference to fix
Must check README files as part of the Tier 2 prose candidate set

evals.prompt: I added a brand-new skill `rds-best-practices` and already ran the new-skill workflow. Before I open the PR, run update-docs in chat-only mode to give me a checklist of what's stale.
evals.expected_output: A PASS/STALE markdown table covering both Tier 1 (script-managed) and Tier 2 (prose) surfaces, with a fix checklist of one-line commands for any STALE entries.
